title: The Hexagonal Hive and a Mouse in a Maze
original_title: The Hexagonal Hive and a Mouse in a Maze
overview: A collection of thoughts and journeys. A dialogue between different forms of knowledge. A film about dancing, working, and life itself. The Hexagonal Hive and a Mouse in a Maze explores current ideas about learning in a global context.
